title: Azalea SMP Serverside
description: The serverside mods for the Azalea SMP.
body:
# Serverside mods for the Phoenix SMP
***Note:*** if you are looking for the modpack in order to play the Phoenix SMP, this is the wrong modpack. This modpack is for running on the server itself.

This modpack adds the following mods:
<details>
<summary>Mods list</summary>

- [Adorn](https://modrinth.com/mod/adorn)
- [Discord-MC-Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/discord-mc-chat)
- [Inv View](https://modrinth.com/mod/invview)
- [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)
- [Areas](https://modrinth.com/mod/areas)
- [Automatic Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/automatic-doors)
- [Better Beacon Placement](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beacon-placement)
- [Better Than Mending](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-than-mending)
- [Campanion](https://modrinth.com/mod/campanion)
- [Carpet Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet-extra)
- [Cinderscapes](https://modrinth.com/mod/cinderscapes)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective)
- [CoroUtil](https://modrinth.com/mod/coroutil)
- [Crafting+](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafting+)
- [CraftingPad](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftingpad)
- [Crying Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/crying-portals)
- [Charm of Undying](https://modrinth.com/mod/charm-of-undying)
- [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)
- [Double Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/double-doors)
- [Essential Commands](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential-commands)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Fixed Anvil Repair Cost](https://modrinth.com/mod/fixed-anvil-repair-cost)
- [Gravestones](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravestones)
- [Immersive Armors](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-armors)
- [Inventorio](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventorio)
- [Inventory Interactions](https://modrinth.com/mod/quick-repair)
- [Just Player Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-player-heads)
- [Keep My Soil Tilled](https://modrinth.com/mod/keep-my-soil-tilled)
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)
- [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Log Cleaner](https://modrinth.com/mod/log-cleaner)
- [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix)
- [Merge Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/mod/merge-enchantments)
- [Mob Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/moborigins)
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)
- [Mooshroom Spawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/mooshroom-spawn)
- [Mo' Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/mo-structures)
- [No Elytra](https://modrinth.com/mod/noelytra)
- [Origins: Umbrellas](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-umbrellas)
- [Replanting Crops](https://modrinth.com/mod/replanting-crops)
- [Repurposed Structures - Quilt/Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric)
- [Shulker Drops Two](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulker-drops-two)
- [Smaller Nether Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/smaller-nether-portals)
- [Smooth Boot (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/smoothboot-fabric)
- [Snow Under Trees (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/snow-under-trees-fabric)
- [Stonecobbling](https://modrinth.com/mod/stonecobbling)
- [Stoneholm](https://modrinth.com/mod/stoneholm)
- [Terrestria](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrestria)
- [Traverse](https://modrinth.com/mod/traverse)
- [Tree Harvester](https://modrinth.com/mod/tree-harvester)
- [Village Spawn Point](https://modrinth.com/mod/village-spawn-point)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)
- [What Are They Up To (Watut)](https://modrinth.com/mod/what-are-they-up-to)
- [Where Is It](https://modrinth.com/mod/where-is-it)
- [WITS (What Is This Structure?)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wits)
- [Wool Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/wool-tweaks)

</details>

For help and support you may contact a maintainer of the project on Discord, either @`orangc` or @`gzultimate`.
